name: Evolzar Lars
name_jp: エヴォルカイザー・ラーズ
desc:
2 Level 6 monsters
While this card has material, your opponent cannot target it with monster effects. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from this card, or just 1 material if all this card's materials are Reptile and/or Dinosaur, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 6 monsters
While this card has material, your opponent cannot target it with monster effects. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from this card, or just 1 material if all this card's materials are Reptile and/or Dinosaur, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn.
eff:
2 Level 6 monsters
While this card has material, your opponent cannot target it with monster effects. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from this card, or just 1 material if all this card's materials are Reptile and/or Dinosaur, then target 1 face-up card your opponent controls; negate its effects until the end of this turn.

action: Applies effects if Xyz Material is attached
Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
